Interface IGridLayout

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Grid layout.

[Guid("C0D5C96E-3FC1-4CB8-BD6E-BAB7DA1D4730")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGridLayout : INetworkDiagramLayout

Properties

CellHeight

Indicates the height of each grid cell in the diagram coordinate system.

double CellHeight { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellWidth

Indicates the width of each grid cell in the diagram coordinate system.

double CellWidth { get; set; }

double
